title: apifetch: a generic toolkit for token-authenticated REST API retrieval (Python)
description: apifetch is a small, dependency-light Python toolkit for talking to token-authenticated REST APIs. It handles token management in process environment variables (never written to disk), pluggable authentication and pagination strategies bundled into a reusable Api profile, and paged data retrieval. It is the Python sibling of the R package apifetch; both were extracted from the BigDataPE package.
